authBody: Sign in through the configured identity provider. Your session credentials stay only in this browser tab's memory.
authConnectedOnly: First sign in and role verification require an internet connection.
authProviderUnavailableBody: The identity provider is not configured for this application origin. No access has been granted.
authReturnFailed: A secure return state could not be created. Try again when the service is available.
stateLoadingBody: Identity, role and authorization are being verified.
stateUnauthenticatedBody: No verified identity is held in this browser tab.
stateDeniedBody: This account does not have the required role or application access.
stateExpiredBody: Protected information remains hidden. Sign in again to refresh authorization.
stateWithdrawnBody: Protected processing and access have stopped. No protected content is shown.
stateUnavailableBody: Current information cannot be verified, so this screen will not show estimates or sample values.
farmerAuthHeading: Sign in to the Farmer service
farmerTodayBody: Your identity and Farmer role are verified. Daily farm guidance is not available until the owning setup and agronomy milestones are complete.
farmerContextUnavailable: Farm setup is not available in this milestone.
evidenceEmpty: No usable evidence is available for this card yet.
rskWorkBody: Your staff identity, MFA, office and jurisdiction are verified. Operational work arrives in its owning milestone.
rskProtectedBody: Farmer details are absent until a current grant, exact purpose, consent, capability and audit-before-disclose check all succeed.
mpAuthHeading: Sign in to MP Office Intelligence
mpOverviewBody: Your MP role is verified. No aggregate is displayed until a complete signed privacy release is active.
mpReleaseUnavailable: No current privacy release is available. Metrics, rankings and maps remain absent.
